news.t: US Treasury rout tests Washington's tolerance for higher borrowing costs
This legendary investor has been shorting Treasury bonds. Here's how to bet with him — without going broke.

overview.description: The Vanguard Short-Term Treasury ETF (VGSH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of fixed income securities issued by the US Treasury, excluding inflation-protected securities, with maturities of 1-3 years. VGSH was launched on Nov 19, 2009 and is issued by Vanguard.
